title: OEM bulletin 2026-Q3 UPDATE pack for existing products
what_this_is: New symptoms, failure modes, parts, diagnostic steps, and technician resolutions for products ALREADY in the knowledge base. Admin should classify these as UPDATES, not NEW products. Domain TBox unchanged — ABox instance growth only.
admin_hint: 2. Expect UPDATES (existing product IDs), not only NEW
4. Validate ABox → Materialize → Smoke → Approve → Promote selection only
Do NOT run pipeline from this script — operator runs Admin.
